_readme: 15 golden inputs per docs/GOLDEN.md, remapped to the official GVMC 98-ward list (8 Jul decision). expected_ward may be a string or array (any-of, for landmark-resolved items). Voice/photo items reference assets/golden/ files — voice clips generated via scripts/generate-golden-audio.ts (ElevenLabs), photos human-provided per assets/golden/README.md. record_script documents the content, not sent to the API. G11 expected_ward list is computed from ward centroids near RK Beach (scripts/nearest-wards.ts).

items.text: పెదగంట్యాడ లో డ్రైనేజీ పొంగి రోడ్డంతా మురుగునీరు నిండిపోయింది. పిల్లలు స్కూల్‌కి వెళ్ళలేకపోతున్నారు, దోమలు విపరీతంగా పెరిగిపోయాయి.
ఎంవీపీ సెక్టర్ 12 లో మా వీధి లైటు రెండు వారాలుగా వెలగడం లేదు. రాత్రి పూట నడవడం కష్టంగా ఉంది.

items.record_script: Telugu: Madhura Nagar lo water supply roju oka ganta matrame — 1hr/day water supply, mentions Madhura Nagar
Telugu: Pendurthi PHC lo doctor levaru — no doctor at the PHC, patients returning, mentions Pendurthi

items.caption: అక్కయ్యపాలెం 80 ఫీట్ రోడ్డు మార్కెట్ దగ్గర చెత్త కుప్పలు వారం రోజులుగా ఎవరూ తీయడం లేదు, దుర్వాసన భరించలేకపోతున్నాం.
items.record_script: Photo of a garbage pile (any representative image, jpg)

items.text: सीतम्माधारा जंक्शन में स्कूल जाने वाले रास्ते पर बड़े-बड़े गड्ढे हैं। बच्चों को रोज़ परेशानी होती है, बारिश में हालत और खराब हो जाती है।
भीम नगर के सरकारी स्कूल की इमारत की हालत बहुत खराब है, छत से पानी टपकता है और दीवारों में दरारें हैं। मरम्मत की सख्त ज़रूरत है।

items.record_script: Hindi: Nehru Nagar mein naale se bahut badbu aa rahi hai — drainage smell complaint, mentions Nehru Nagar

items.caption: मधुसूदन नगर में इस सड़क पर कुछ जगह छोटे-छोटे गड्ढे हो गए हैं, ठीक करवा दीजिए।
items.record_script: Photo of a road with minor potholes (any representative image, jpg)

items.text: Water tanker in Bunglow Metta has become totally irregular. Sometimes it skips three days in a row and we have no idea when it will come.
A few streetlights near RK Beach on Beach Road have not been working for the past week. It is a minor inconvenience for evening walkers, would be nice to have them fixed.
expected_ward: Ward 52 - Air Port & New Police Quarters

items.ward: Ward 14 - Near N R I Hospital
items.record_script: English: The clinic near NRI Hospital has run out of basic medicines, BP and diabetes patients sent away
items.expected_ward: Ward 14 - Near N R I Hospital

items.text: Madhura Nagar lo manchi neellu raavatledu sir, 3 days nunchi. Tap tipite gaali sound matrame vastundi, bottle water kontunnam.
MVP Sector 12 main road lo pedda gunta undi sir, two wheeler valla ki chala dangerous. Night time accident aiyye chance chala ekkuva.

items.record_script: Hinglish: Ambedkar Nagar mein nala overflow ho raha hai, bacche school nahi ja pa rahe — mentions Ambedkar Nagar
